/usr/lib/ccache/c++   -std=c++11 -Wall -O3 -g  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/uav_utils-test.dir/src/uav_utils_test.cpp.o  -o /home/lyx/kufei_auto/Fast-Drone-250/devel/lib/uav_utils/uav_utils-test   -L/home/lyx/kufei_auto/Fast-Drone-250/src/utils/cmake_utils/lib/mosek8  -L/home/lyx/kufei_auto/Fast-Drone-250/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lyx/kufei_auto/Fast-Drone-250/src/utils/cmake_utils/lib/mosek8:/home/lyx/kufei_auto/Fast-Drone-250/build/gtest:/home/lyx/kufei_auto/Fast-Drone-250/build/gtest/lib ../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so -luav_utils -lpthread
